zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie De Peteghem於1221年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德希時，她的父親Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing36歲，母親Maria de Bourghelles37歲。她於1254年與Hugues V DANTOING結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1270年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie De Peteghem于1221年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德希时，她的父亲Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing36岁，母亲Maria de Bourghelles37岁。她于1254年与Hugues V DANTOING结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1270年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie De Peteghem was born in 1221, in Cysoing, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing, was 36 and her mother, Maria de Bourghelles, was 37. She married Hugues V DANTOING in 1254. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1270, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie De Peteghem est née en 1221, à Cysoing, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maria de Bourghelles, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues V DANTOING en 1254. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1270, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie De Peteghem 1221 in Cysoing, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing 36 und ihre Mutter Maria de Bourghelles 37. Sie hat 1254 Hugues V DANTOING geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1270 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie De Peteghem è nata il nel 1221 nel Cysoing, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Maria de Bourghelles, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Hugues V DANTOING nel 1254. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1270, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie De Peteghemが1221年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードシソイングで生まれた時，父Jean III van Peteghem Cysoingは36歳，母Maria de Bourghellesは37歳であった。1254年にHugues V DANTOINGと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1270年に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie De Peteghem(이)가 1221년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 시소잉에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria de Bourghelles(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1254년 Hugues V DANTOING(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie De Peteghem nasceu em 1221, em Cysoing, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Maria de Bourghelles, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues V DANTOING em 1254. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1270, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie De Peteghem родилась в 1221 г. в местности сисоинг, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria de Bourghelles, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues V DANTOING в 1254 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1270 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie De Peteghem nació en 1221, en Cysoing, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Maria de Bourghelles, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Hugues V DANTOING en 1254. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1270, a la edad de 49 años.
